generated_assessment.reasoning: This person's very low Agreeableness (especially single-digit Trust and Straightforwardness; bottom-quintile Tender-Mindedness) together with high Anger/Hostility and a conventional, practical Openness produce a deep skepticism about mainstream journalism being impartial. While Extraversion and moderate Neuroticism add some engagement with news, their tough-minded, low-trust disposition and age-related exposure to media criticism lead to a clearly negative baseline stance, albeit not maximal because they still consume some information.
